mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_scheduled_job_config (job_key, cron_expr, enabled, project_id, last_run_at) VALUES (#{jobKey}, #{cronExpr}, #{enabled}, #{projectId}, #{lastRunAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE mag_scheduled_job_config SET job_key = #{jobKey}, cron_expr = #{cronExpr}, enabled = #{enabled}, project_id = #{projectId}, last_run_at = #{lastRunAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mag_scheduled_job_config ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM mag_scheduled_job_config WHERE project_id = #{projectId} OR project_id IS NULL ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM mag_scheduled_job_config WHERE job_key = #{jobKey} LIMIT 1
